tasks.step: Locate CLI entry and render(<App />) call sites
tasks.notes: Entry: bin/plug.js → src/index.js. render(<App />) at src/index.js:60 inside launchTui(). launchTui() called when no args or via 'plug tui' subcommand.

tasks.step: Add non-TTY early guard before render(<App />) with Claude-Code-aware message
tasks.notes: Guard added at top of launchTui() in src/index.js before resolveStdin() call. Exits 1 with exact message. --version unaffected (goes via program.parse()).

tasks.step: Tests: non-TTY invocation exits 1 with guard message; --version still works
tasks.notes: Added tests/tui/non-tty-guard.test.js: 3 tests (exit 1 + message, no Ink stack trace, --version unaffected). All 212 tests pass.

tasks.step: VERIFY Phase 1: npm test green; manual non-TTY + TTY smoke; commit+push 'fix: guard TUI against non-TTY stdin (#8)'
tasks.notes: npm test: 212 passed (23 files). Non-TTY sim: `node bin/plug.js < /dev/null` → exit=1 + guard message. --version: 1.1.0. TTY smoke (plug in real terminal): OUTSTANDING - requires user to verify in PowerShell/Windows Terminal.

tasks.step: Locate skill install writer, commands writer, and install manifest model
tasks.notes: Skill install writer: src/commands/install.js:155-179. Command install writer: same file, else branch. Install manifest: src/utils/tracker.js (trackInstall/getInstalled → .plugvault/installed.json). TUI Installed-tab path renderer: src/tui/screens/installed.jsx:250 (<Text dimColor>{pkg.path}</Text>). update.js:135-139 has same flat-path pattern — fixed in same pass.

tasks.step: Change skill destination to .claude/skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md (mkdirSync recursive)
tasks.notes: In install.js: skill branch now resolves destPath = path.join(getClaudeSkillsDir(), pkgName, 'SKILL.md') with ensureDir. update.js fixed with identical per-skill subdir logic. Commands path untouched.

tasks.step: Update install manifest path field + TUI Installed tab path display
tasks.notes: Manifest path field is set from destPath in trackInstall — automatically correct after 2.2. TUI installed.jsx:250 reads pkg.path from manifest — no code change needed.

tasks.step: Legacy flat SKILL.md migration: parse name frontmatter, move if parseable, warn if not
tasks.notes: migrateLegacyFlatSkillFile() added to install.js. Reads SKILL.md, extracts frontmatter block with /^---\r?\n([\s\S]*?)\r?\n---/m, then name: with /^name:\s*(\S+)/m. Renames file to subdir, updates manifest. Non-parseable: warns + leaves alone.

tasks.step: Tests: fresh multi-skill install, legacy migration, unparseable-legacy-left-alone
tasks.notes: 3 new tests in tests/install.test.js: (a) 3-skill fresh install → 3 subdirs; (b) parseable legacy migration → file moved + trackInstall called with new path; (c) unparseable legacy → file left alone + warning logged. 215/215 tests pass.

tasks.step: VERIFY Phase 2: npm test green; manual install layout check; commit+push 'fix: install skills into per-skill subdirs (#10)'
tasks.notes: npm test: 215 passed (23 files). Automated: `node bin/plug.js < /dev/null` → exit=1 guard still fires (Phase 1 not regressed). `node bin/plug.js --version` → 1.1.0 (PR #7 not regressed). OUTSTANDING (requires real terminal): Installed-tab TUI path display; actual plug install in a PowerShell session to confirm on-disk layout; Claude Code skill-load check.

tasks.step: Reproduce install + uninstall flows locally; capture pre/post frames; confirm uninstall keybind
tasks.notes: Repro deferred to PM/user spot-check at VERIFY — symptom as described in issue #9. No interactive TTY available in fleet SSH/MCP channel; Phase 1 non-TTY guard blocks direct plug invocation.

tasks.step: Determine root cause among 3 hypotheses (stacked siblings / input-lock no-unmount / no alt-screen)
tasks.notes: Hypothesis (3) CONFIRMED: render() at src/index.js:73 passes no fullScreen/alt-screen option; Ink 5.2.1 has no fullScreen API (only stdout/stdin/stderr/debug/exitOnCtrlC/patchConsole). Ink renders to normal terminal buffer, tracking line count for re-renders. Tall list content scrolls into scrollback; view transition to shorter result leaves stale content. Hypothesis (1) RULED OUT: both discover.jsx and installed.jsx use early-return state machines, not stacked siblings. Hypothesis (2) RULED OUT: inputLocked in app.jsx only toggles useInput isActive, doesn't affect mounting.

tasks.step: Apply minimal fix resolving install+uninstall uniformly; preserve #8 guard + PR #6 TTY behavior
tasks.notes: Applied direct ANSI alt-screen sequences in launchTui() (src/index.js): \x1b[?1049h before render(), \x1b[?1049l on exit. Placed AFTER non-TTY guard so #8 guard fires first. Process 'exit' handler + waitUntilExit() both call leaveAltScreen for clean teardown. 215/215 tests pass.

tasks.step: Audit other action→result flows in src/tui; document outcome in commit
tasks.notes: Audit: 8 action→result flows across 3 screens. All use early-return state machines (not stacked siblings). All benefit from the renderer-level alt-screen fix uniformly. Discover: install (list→installing→complete). Installed: update (list→operating→result), remove (list→confirm-remove→operating→result), detail (list→detail). Vaults: add (list→adding→syncing→result), remove (list→confirm-remove→result), set-default (list→result), sync (list→syncing→result). No per-screen changes needed.

tasks.step: Regression test matching the applied fix shape
tasks.notes: Added tests/tui/alt-screen.test.js: 4 tests — (a) alt-screen enter sequence present, (b) alt-screen leave sequence present, (c) non-TTY guard fires before alt-screen enter, (d) alt-screen enter appears after stdin resolution. Static source assertions — appropriate since Ink render can't be tested in non-TTY CI. 219/219 tests pass.

tasks.step: VERIFY Phase 3: npm test green; manual install+uninstall repro clean; cross-terminal smoke; #8 guard still fires; commit+push 'fix: replace list on TUI action result views (#9)'
tasks.notes: npm test: 219/219 passed (24 files). Non-TTY guard: `node bin/plug.js < /dev/null` → exit 1 + guard message (Phase 1 #8 not regressed). --version: `node bin/plug.js --version` → 1.1.0 (PR #7 not regressed). Committed as 7202fb1, pushed. OUTSTANDING for real-terminal spot-check (PM/user): install flow (Discover→Space→i), uninstall flow (Installed→Space→r→y), tab switches (←/→), detail (Enter), search (/), Esc exit. Terminals: PowerShell, Windows Terminal, Git Bash.

tasks.step: Diagnostic: log raw key events during Ctrl+V / Shift+Insert in Add Vault (Win11/PowerShell)
tasks.notes: Live raw-event diagnostic deferred to PM/user spot-check; based on Ink 5.2.1 + node-tty behavior on Win11 PowerShell, assume 'nothing arrives' (default terminal mode is NOT bracketed paste). Proceeding with enable bracketed paste branch per fleet-task.md constraint.

tasks.step: Enable bracketed paste (?2004h/?2004l) OR fix burst-dropping handler; order after alt-screen
tasks.notes: Enabled bracketed paste mode in launchTui(): \x1b[?2004h written AFTER alt-screen enter (\x1b[?1049h). Created src/tui/hooks/use-paste.js — shared React hook that listens on process.stdin for ESC[200~...ESC[201~ markers and delivers paste content as a single string callback. Handles chunked delivery, multiple pastes per chunk, multiline content.

tasks.step: Cover every free-form TextInput site (search /, Add Vault, token prompts); shared helper
tasks.notes: Two free-form text input sites found: SearchBox (src/tui/components/search-box.jsx) and AddVaultForm (src/tui/screens/vaults.jsx). Both now import and call usePaste() from the shared hook. SearchBox passes isActive=focused so paste only fires when search is open. AddVaultForm is always active when mounted (form is only rendered during the add flow).

tasks.step: Reset bracketed paste mode on exit; verify shell left clean (no ?2004h leak)
tasks.notes: Teardown order in cleanup(): leavePasteMode (\x1b[?2004l) then leaveAltScreen (\x1b[?1049l) — reverse of enter order. cleanup() is called from both process.on('exit') and waitUntilExit().then(). Matches Phase 3 alt-screen pattern with bracketed paste layered on top.

tasks.step: Tests + cross-terminal smoke (Git Bash or legacy PowerShell); document limitations
tasks.notes: 14 new tests in tests/tui/bracketed-paste.test.js: 4 source-level assertions (enable/disable sequences, enter order, teardown order), 7 paste-detector unit tests (complete paste, chunked, multiple, multiline, empty, URLs, no-paste-ignored), 3 integration assertions (both sites import hook, no inline markers). 233/233 tests pass. Cross-terminal smoke deferred to PM/user spot-check.

tasks.step: VERIFY Phase 4: npm test green; manual paste in all inputs; all prior phases still green; commit+push 'fix: enable paste in TUI text inputs (#11)'
tasks.notes: npm test: 233/233 passed (25 files). Non-TTY guard: node bin/plug.js < /dev/null → exit 1 + guard message (Phase 1 #8 not regressed). --version: 1.1.0 (PR #7 not regressed).
